name: [PDF] A Multi-Level Monte Carlo FPGA Accelerator for Option Pricing in the
snippet:
We show that a multi-level Monte Carlo architecture for asset path simulations in the Heston model only consumes 3.58 W on a Xilinx Virtex-. 6 FPGA. Our design ...
